name: Cash For Gold
description_short: LA Cash for Gold buys precious metals and certified coins in Pasadena, California, offering 75-90% of spot prices with real-time price transparency.
description_long:
LA Cash for Gold was founded in 2007 after the founders researched the cash-for-gold market and identified a gap in transparent, fair-priced precious metal buying services. The company operates as a precious metals buyer specializing in gold, silver, and platinum jewelry and certified coins in the Los Angeles area, with a physical location in Pasadena, California.

The company's primary service is purchasing precious metals directly from consumers. They offer live price charts displaying current spot prices for gold (multiple karats from 10K to 24K), silver (various purities), and platinum. Customers can check real-time payout prices by weight measurement (grams, DWT, ounces) and sell items including wedding bands, bracelets, necklaces, and certified coins (NGC and PCGS certified U.S. coins). The business operates by appointment only and provides transparent pricing based on market conditions.

LA Cash for Gold distinguishes itself through claimed competitive payouts (75-90% of New York Spot Price versus industry standard 20-50%) and transparency via their live price calculator website. They emphasize honest dealing and market-rate transparency, displaying current spot prices on their website updated in real-time. The company specializes in NGC and PCGS certified coins and claims to offer fair pricing based on mintage and condition.

However, several limitations exist: the business operates appointment-only (not walk-in), has limited geographic service (Pasadena/Los Angeles area only), and website testimonials appear to use placeholder lorem ipsum text rather than genuine customer reviews. No third-party verification of their claimed 75-90% payout rates is available on the website. The company's claim about being founded due to lack of market transparency in 2007 is unverified.
address: 1890 S Western Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90006

company_info.headquarters: 1890 S Western Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90006

pros: Live real-time spot price charts for gold, silver, and platinum displayed on website with transparent calculation tools
Specialized in NGC and PCGS certified U.S. coins with stated fair pricing based on mintage and condition
Claims to offer 75-90% of New York Spot Price, significantly higher than stated industry standard of 20-50%
Transparent selling process with detailed price charts showing specific payouts by karat weight and measurement unit
Appointment-only model reduces walk-in pressure and allows for potentially more thorough evaluation
Multiple metal options accepted including gold jewelry, coins, silver flatware, and platinum items
cons: Appointment-only business model limits accessibility and convenience for spontaneous sellers
Website testimonials are placeholder text (lorem ipsum), raising credibility concerns about genuine customer reviews
Geographic limitation to Los Angeles/Pasadena area only—no mail-in or remote service mentioned
No independent verification available on the website of claimed 75-90% payout rates versus competitors
No information provided about fees, holding periods, payment methods, or other transaction terms
best_for: Los Angeles-area residents with gold jewelry, silver items, or certified coins to sell locally
Collectors of NGC and PCGS certified coins seeking fair market pricing
People looking to liquidate precious metals or jewelry with transparent, real-time pricing visibility
diagnosis: LA Cash for Gold is best for Los Angeles-area residents and collectors who want to sell precious metals or certified coins with transparent spot-price visibility. The main caveat is that appointment-only service limits convenience, testimonials lack credibility, and the company's payout claims lack independent third-party verification.
services: Silver flatware and coins buying (0.800-0.999 purity)
NGC certified coin buying and evaluation
PCGS certified coin buying and evaluation
Live spot price charts and real-time market pricing
Precious metals calculator for payout estimation
Transparent payout pricing based on weight and purity
